ENCE464 Civil and Environmental Engineering Design I (2 Credits)

This experiential course provides structured and unstructured time for group work as part of the senior capstone design course. The course gives students a chance to practice the skills acquired throughout a student's academic career. The course provides students with hands-on experience similar to the experience encountered by new engineers in professional engineering and construction practice. The course offers students an opportunity to develop the leadership and group work skills needed to meet professional expectations.
